name: forge_orient
description: Session-start meta-tool. Prints a single brief that synthesizes everything an AI agent needs to make good tool selections in the PlausiDen-Forge repo: Rule 0 (substrate-only-path), affordance inventory (AGENTS.md / TOOLS.md / Makefile / skills / capability-request workflow), canonical defaults (axum/tokio/sqlx/maud/serde-deny_unknown/Ed25519/ML-DSA/clap/anyhow-thiserror/proptest/tracing), doctrine rules applicable to a scoped path, skill map for common tasks, and anti-pattern reminders. Replaces the aspirational 'read AGENTS.md, then TOOLS.md, then doctrine, then...' with one mechanical step. Always reach for this first when starting work in PlausiDen-Forge.

for_path.description: Optional path within the workspace. When provided, scopes the doctrine-rules section to rules whose applies_to entries match path-derived context tokens. Example: 'crates/forge-phases' surfaces rules tagged with that crate.

doctrine_dir.description: Override the AVP-Doctrine directory. Defaults to a sibling directory PlausiDen-AVP-Doctrine, or the PLAUSIDEN_DOCTRINE_DIR env var if set.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text. Recommended for AI consumption.
